title: Partner/educator outreach + adoption-path shortlist
context: All tasks carry verifiedNeed:false and requestor:TO BE SECURED because per-deliverable adoption by a named educator or org is not yet confirmed. Without a real beneficiary accepting the sheets, the project's headline outcome metric (sheets used in real teaching) cannot be met. Outreach to educators, literacy NGOs, homeschool co-ops, refugee-education programs, and OER repositories must begin at M0 so partners are in the loop before the pilot is ready to hand over.
objective: Contact at least 3 candidate partners (e.g. a literacy/refugee-education NGO, an early-literacy teacher network, and an OER repository), document the outreach, and produce a realistic adoption-path shortlist including a self-serve OER fallback if no partner confirms.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 candidate partners contacted from distinct categories (literacy/refugee-education NGO, teacher/educator network, OER portal).
Outreach log committed: partner name, contact date, channel, response status, and any commitments made.
Adoption-path shortlist documents at least two realistic paths to use: (a) direct educator adoption and (b) OER self-publish fallback with the blocker surfaced.
Any partner that confirms adoption is recorded; the corresponding tasks are identified for verifiedNeed and requestor updates.
resources: PLAN.md section 2 (Beneficiaries), section 11 (Steward role), section 13 (Risks — no partner adopts)
PLAN.md section 8 (Definition of Shipped — self-serve OER fallback)
output: A committed outreach log and adoption-path shortlist (e.g. docs/outreach.md), with at least 3 contacts recorded and a self-serve OER fallback path documented.
